en-US.title: Sofa - Movie & TV Tracker
en-US.subtitle: Companion app for Sofa servers
en-US.promoText: Sofa connects to your self-hosted server to track movies and TV shows. Log what you watch, manage your watchlist, and auto-track from Plex, Jellyfin, and Emby.
en-US.description:
Sofa Mobile is the companion app for your self-hosted Sofa server. Track movies and TV shows, manage your watchlist, and pick up where you left off — all from your phone.

A running Sofa server is required. Set one up at https://sofa.watch

TRACK EVERYTHING YOU WATCH
Add movies and shows to your watchlist, mark them as watching or completed, and rate them on a 5-star scale. For TV shows, track progress down to individual episodes — mark a single episode, an entire season, or jump straight to where you left off.

DISCOVER WHAT'S NEXT
Browse trending and popular titles, filter by genre, and get recommendations based on what's already in your library. Search across movies, TV shows, and people. Tap into any actor's filmography to find your next watch.

SEE WHERE TO WATCH
View streaming availability for any title so you know where to find it before you sit down.

AUTO-TRACK FROM YOUR MEDIA SERVER
Connect Plex, Jellyfin, or Emby to automatically log what you watch — no manual entry needed. Set up Sonarr and Radarr to sync your watchlist for automatic downloads.

YOUR DATA, YOUR SERVER
Sofa is fully self-hosted. Your watch history, ratings, and library stay on your own server. No accounts with third parties, no data leaving your network unless you want it to.

ADMIN ON THE GO
Server admins can check server health, manage registration settings, and see update notifications right from the app.

• Watchlist, watching, and completed status tracking
• Per-episode and per-season progress tracking
• Continue Watching with next-episode info
• Trending, popular, and personalized recommendations
• Genre filtering
• Full cast and filmography browsing
• Streaming availability
• Plex, Jellyfin, and Emby webhook integration
• Sonarr and Radarr watchlist sync
• Multi-user support with admin controls
• Email/password and OIDC/SSO authentication

review.notes: Use https://app-store-demo.sofa.watch to login to the demo account.
